Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class MetadataContainer

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataContainer
public class MetadataContainer extends SObject

Java class for MetadataContainer complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MetadataContainer">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApexClassMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexComponentMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexPageMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApexTriggerMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AuraDefinitionChanges" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomFieldMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ValidationRuleMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkflowAlertMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkflowFieldUpdateMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkflowOutboundMessageMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkflowRuleMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WorkflowTaskMembers" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
